---
name: Request a new DESIGN.md
about: Propose a new brand/site to add to the collection
title: "[new] DESIGN.md for {brand-name}"
labels: new-design, needs-review
assignees: ''
---

## Brand / Site

**Name**: {e.g., Airbnb}
**URL**: {e.g., https://airbnb.com}
**Category**: {e.g., E-commerce / SaaS / Luxury / Dev Tools / Fintech}

## Why this site?

What makes this site's design distinctive and worth documenting?

- {e.g., "Coral accent color used with extreme restraint"}
- {e.g., "Custom variable font with OpenType discipline"}
- {e.g., "Unique scroll-driven product reveal pattern"}

## Extraction plan

How will you extract the tokens?

- [ ] Live site inspection (DevTools + Computed styles)
- [ ] CSS custom properties in `:root`
- [ ] Existing design system documentation (if public)
- [ ] Screenshots for visual reference (light + dark if applicable)

## Commitment

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and understand the v2.0 quality bar
- [ ] I understand the target is 700-1100 lines of real tokens (not padding)
- [ ] I will include measured contrast ratios, not guessed values
- [ ] I will complete all 14 sections from [TEMPLATE.md](../TEMPLATE.md) — no "TBD" or "..."
- [ ] I will test the generated DESIGN.md with an AI agent before submitting

## Timeline

When do you expect to submit the PR? {e.g., "within 2 weeks"}

---

**Note to maintainers**: Please approve this proposal before the contributor starts work. Approval prevents wasted effort if the site isn't a fit for the collection.
